meta.description: Hssabaty Point de vente is a POS solution by Hssabaty startup, building multiple solutions for companies.

home.headline: Hssabaty Point de vente
home.subhead: Modern POS solution by Hssabaty, built for companies.

confirmBan.title: Ban this merchant?
confirmBan.description: This will ban the account and cancel their subscription. This action can be reversed.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this merchant permanently?
confirmDelete.description: This will permanently delete the merchant account and all related data (staff, locations, sales, etc.). This action cannot be undone!

cashierLogin.fullSubtitle: Use the email and password from your manager. After that, this device can remember your email so you only enter your 4-digit PIN.
cashierLogin.useFullLogin: Sign in with email and password
cashierLogin.clearedEmail: Saved email cleared for this device.

errors.pinFailed: Could not sign in. Check your PIN or use full sign-in.
errors.pinLocked: PIN locked — try again in {seconds} s.
errors.fullLoginRequired: Please sign in with email and password again (required every 30 days or after your manager updates your email).
errors.notCashier: This account is not a staff cashier. Use the standard sign-in page.

managerStaff.title: Staff (cashiers)
managerStaff.subtitle: Create cashier accounts for your store: each person has an email, password for full sign-in, and a 4-digit PIN for quick daily sign-in on the staff page.
managerStaff.cardDescription: Edit email when someone changes their address — staff will need to sign in with password again on each device.

overview.statActiveHint: Can sign in and use the POS
overview.statPinReadyHint: PIN-only sign-in allowed (within 30 days of full login)
overview.hintBody: Cashiers use the staff sign-in page: full login with email and password first, then this device can remember the email for PIN-only login. After 5 minutes without touching the POS, the screen locks and they enter their checkout PIN again.

managerStaff.emptyDescription: Add your first team member to give them access to checkout with email, password, and a 4-digit PIN.

fields.name: Display name
fields.pinHint: Used with remembered email on the staff sign-in page. Separate from the lock-screen PIN after login.

create.title: New cashier
create.description: Share the password securely once; staff can use PIN for daily sign-in after the first full login.

editDialog.title: Edit cashier
editDialog.description: Updating the email signs them out everywhere until they sign in again.
editDialog.emailWarning: Changing the email invalidates remembered devices and requires a full password sign-in before PIN-only works again.

permissions.title: Cashier access
permissions.subtitle: Choose what {name} can do in the POS, catalog, and customers area.
permissions.catalogForced: Catalog visibility is automatically enabled when product management is enabled.

permKeys.saleLookupById: Open team sales by receipt ID

errors.validation: Check all fields (password min. 8 characters, PIN exactly 4 digits).
